{
  "contents": "/**\n * Cline 数据读取器\n * 负责从 Cline 的 JSON 文件读取任务数据\n */\n\nimport * as fs from 'fs';\nimport * as path from 'path';\nimport {\n    ClineTask,\n    ClineTaskHistory,\n    ClineTaskMetadata,\n    ClineApiConversation,\n    ClineUIMessages\n} from './cline-types';\n\nexport class ClineReader {\n    private tasksDir: string;\n    \n    constructor(private storageDir: string) {\n        this.tasksDir = path.join(storageDir, 'tasks');\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 获取所有任务\n     */\n    getAllTasks(): ClineTask[] {\n        // 读取任务历史索引\n        const historyPath = path.join(this.storageDir, 'state', 'taskHistory.json');\n        \n        console.log('[DEBUG] ClineReader.getAllTasks()');\n        console.log('[DEBUG] Looking for taskHistory at:', historyPath);\n        \n        if (!fs.existsSync(historyPath)) {\n            console.warn('[DEBUG] Task history file not found:', historyPath);\n            \n            // 尝试列出 state 目录的内容\n            const stateDir = path.join(this.storageDir, 'state');\n            if (fs.existsSync(stateDir)) {\n                const files = fs.readdirSync(stateDir);\n                console.log('[DEBUG] Files in state directory:', files);\n            } else {\n                console.warn('[DEBUG] State directory does not exist:', stateDir);\n            }\n            \n            return [];\n        }\n        \n        console.log('[DEBUG] Task history file found');\n        \n        let taskItems: ClineTaskHistory['tasks'];\n        try {\n            const content = fs.readFileSync(historyPath, 'utf-8');\n            console.log('[DEBUG] Task history content length:', content.length);\n            \n            const parsed = JSON.parse(content);\n            \n            // 支持两种格式：\n            // 1. 直接是数组: [{id, task, ...}, ...]\n            // 2. 包装在对象中: {tasks: [{id, task, ...}, ...]}\n            if (Array.isArray(parsed)) {\n                console.log('[DEBUG] Task history is a direct array');\n                taskItems = parsed;\n            } else if (parsed.tasks && Array.isArray(parsed.tasks)) {\n                console.log('[DEBUG] Task history has tasks property');\n                taskItems = parsed.tasks;\n            } else {\n                console.warn('[DEBUG] Unexpected task history format:', typeof parsed);\n                return [];\n            }\n            \n            console.log('[DEBUG] Task history parsed, tasks count:', taskItems.length);\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('[DEBUG] Failed to parse task history:', error);\n            return [];\n        }\n        \n        if (!taskItems || taskItems.length === 0) {\n            console.log('[DEBUG] No tasks in task history');\n            return [];\n        }\n        \n        const tasks: ClineTask[] = [];\n        \n        for (const taskItem of taskItems) {\n            console.log('[DEBUG] Reading task:', taskItem.id);\n            const task = this.getTask(taskItem.id);\n            if (task) {\n                tasks.push(task);\n                console.log('[DEBUG] Task loaded successfully:', taskItem.id);\n            } else {\n                console.warn('[DEBUG] Failed to load task:', taskItem.id);\n            }\n        }\n        \n        console.log(`[DEBUG] Total tasks loaded: ${tasks.length}`);\n        \n        return tasks;\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 获取指定任务\n     */\n    getTask(taskId: string): ClineTask | null {\n        const taskDir = path.join(this.tasksDir, taskId);\n        \n        if (!fs.existsSync(taskDir)) {\n            return null;\n        }\n        \n        try {\n            // 读取 metadata\n            const metadataPath = path.join(taskDir, 'task_metadata.json');\n            const metadata: ClineTaskMetadata = fs.existsSync(metadataPath)\n                ? JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(metadataPath, 'utf-8'))\n                : this.createDefaultMetadata(taskId);\n            \n            // 读取 API conversation\n            const apiConvPath = path.join(taskDir, 'api_conversation_history.json');\n            const apiConversation: ClineApiConversation = fs.existsSync(apiConvPath)\n                ? JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(apiConvPath, 'utf-8'))\n                : { messages: [] };\n            \n            // 读取 UI messages\n            const uiMessagesPath = path.join(taskDir, 'ui_messages.json');\n            const uiMessages: ClineUIMessages = fs.existsSync(uiMessagesPath)\n                ? JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(uiMessagesPath, 'utf-8'))\n                : { messages: [] };\n            \n            // 尝试读取工作区路径（可能在 UI messages 中）\n            const workspaceRoot = this.extractWorkspaceRoot(uiMessages);\n            \n            return {\n                id: taskId,\n                metadata,\n                apiConversation,\n                uiMessages,\n                workspaceRoot\n            };\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error(`Failed to read task ${taskId}:`, error);\n            return null;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 创建默认元数据\n     */\n    private createDefaultMetadata(taskId: string): ClineTaskMetadata {\n        return {\n            version: '1.0',\n            id: taskId,\n            ts: Date.now(),\n            task: 'Untitled Task',\n            tokensIn: 0,\n            tokensOut: 0,\n            totalCost: 0\n        };\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 从 UI messages 中提取工作区路径\n     */\n    private extractWorkspaceRoot(uiMessages: ClineUIMessages): string | undefined {\n        // 尝试从 UI messages 中找到包含路径信息的消息\n        for (const msg of uiMessages.messages) {\n            if (msg.path) {\n                // 可能包含文件路径，尝试提取目录\n                const dirPath = path.dirname(msg.path);\n                if (dirPath && dirPath !== '.') {\n                    return dirPath;\n                }\n            }\n        }\n        return undefined;\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 检查存储目录是否存在\n     */\n    exists(): boolean {\n        return fs.existsSync(this.storageDir) && fs.existsSync(this.tasksDir);\n    }\n}\n\n/**\n * 获取 Cline 存储路径\n */\nexport function getClineStoragePath(): string {\n    const platform = process.platform;\n    const homeDir = process.env.HOME || process.env.USERPROFILE || '';\n    \n    // VS Code 或 Cursor 的存储路径\n    // 根据当前运行环境判断\n    const isVSCode = process.env.VSCODE_CWD !== undefined;\n    const appName = isVSCode ? 'Code' : 'Cursor';\n    \n    console.log('[DEBUG] getClineStoragePath:');\n    console.log('  - platform:', platform);\n    console.log('  - homeDir:', homeDir);\n    console.log('  - VSCODE_CWD:', process.env.VSCODE_CWD);\n    console.log('  - isVSCode:', isVSCode);\n    console.log('  - appName:', appName);\n    \n    let storagePath: string;\n    \n    if (platform === 'win32') {\n        storagePath = path.join(\n            homeDir,\n            `AppData/Roaming/${appName}/User/globalStorage/saoudrizwan.claude-dev`\n        );\n    } else if (platform === 'darwin') {\n        storagePath = path.join(\n            homeDir,\n            `Library/Application Support/${appName}/User/globalStorage/saoudrizwan.claude-dev`\n        );\n    } else {\n        // Linux\n        storagePath = path.join(\n            homeDir,\n            `.config/${appName}/User/globalStorage/saoudrizwan.claude-dev`\n        );\n    }\n    \n    console.log('  - storagePath:', storagePath);\n    \n    return storagePath;\n}\n\n",

}

{
  "contents": "/**\r\n * Cline 对话构建器\r\n * 将 Cline 的 API conversation 转换为统一的消息格式\r\n */\r\n\r\nimport {\r\n    ClineTask,\r\n    ClineMessage,\r\n    ClineApiMessage,\r\n    ClineApiContent,\r\n    ClineToolUse,\r\n    ClineToolResult,\r\n    ClineToolUseContent,\r\n    ClineToolResultContent\r\n} from './cline-types';\r\nimport { Translator } from './i18n';\r\n\r\nexport class ClineConversationBuilder {\r\n    constructor(private t: Translator) {}\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 从 Cline Task 构建完整对话\r\n     */\r\n    buildConversation(task: ClineTask): ClineMessage[] {\r\n        const messages: ClineMessage[] = [];\r\n        let messageIndex = 0;\r\n        \r\n        const apiMessages = task.apiConversation.messages || [];\r\n        \r\n        for (const apiMsg of apiMessages) {\r\n            const message = this.convertApiMessage(apiMsg, messageIndex, task);\r\n            if (message) {\r\n                messages.push(message);\r\n                messageIndex++;\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        return messages;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 转换单个 API 消息\r\n     */\r\n    private convertApiMessage(\r\n        apiMsg: ClineApiMessage,\r\n        index: number,\r\n        task: ClineTask\r\n    ): ClineMessage | null {\r\n        // 生成消息 ID\r\n        const id = `${task.id}-${index}`;\r\n        \r\n        // 处理简单字符串内容\r\n        if (typeof apiMsg.content === 'string') {\r\n            return {\r\n                id,\r\n                type: apiMsg.role,\r\n                text: apiMsg.content,\r\n                timestamp: this.getTimestamp(index, task)\r\n            };\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 处理复杂内容数组\r\n        if (Array.isArray(apiMsg.content)) {\r\n            return this.convertComplexMessage(\r\n                id,\r\n                apiMsg.role,\r\n                apiMsg.content,\r\n                index,\r\n                task\r\n            );\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        return null;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 转换复杂消息（包含多种内容类型）\r\n     */\r\n    private convertComplexMessage(\r\n        id: string,\r\n        role: 'user' | 'assistant',\r\n        content: ClineApiContent,\r\n        index: number,\r\n        task: ClineTask\r\n    ): ClineMessage {\r\n        let text = '';\r\n        const toolUses: ClineToolUse[] = [];\r\n        const toolResults: ClineToolResult[] = [];\r\n        const images: string[] = [];\r\n        \r\n        for (const item of content) {\r\n            switch (item.type) {\r\n                case 'text':\r\n                    text += item.text + '\\n';\r\n                    break;\r\n                \r\n                case 'image':\r\n                    // 保存图片数据引用（实际可能需要单独处理）\r\n                    images.push(`[Image: ${item.source.media_type}]`);\r\n                    break;\r\n                \r\n                case 'tool_use':\r\n                    toolUses.push({\r\n                        id: item.id,\r\n                        name: item.name,\r\n                        input: item.input\r\n                    });\r\n                    break;\r\n                \r\n                case 'tool_result':\r\n                    toolResults.push({\r\n                        id: `result-${item.tool_use_id}`,\r\n                        toolUseId: item.tool_use_id,\r\n                        content: item.content,\r\n                        isError: item.is_error\r\n                    });\r\n                    break;\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        return {\r\n            id,\r\n            type: role,\r\n            text: text.trim(),\r\n            timestamp: this.getTimestamp(index, task),\r\n            toolUses: toolUses.length > 0 ? toolUses : undefined,\r\n            toolResults: toolResults.length > 0 ? toolResults : undefined,\r\n            images: images.length > 0 ? images : undefined\r\n        };\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 获取消息时间戳\r\n     */\r\n    private getTimestamp(index: number, task: ClineTask): string {\r\n        // 尝试从 UI messages 获取精确时间戳\r\n        const uiMessages = task.uiMessages.messages || [];\r\n        \r\n        if (uiMessages[index] && uiMessages[index].ts) {\r\n            return new Date(uiMessages[index].ts).toISOString();\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 否则使用任务创建时间 + 偏移\r\n        const baseTime = task.metadata.ts || Date.now();\r\n        const offset = index * 1000; // 每条消息间隔 1 秒\r\n        return new Date(baseTime + offset).toISOString();\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n\r\n",

  "contents": "/**\r\n * Cline Markdown 生成器\r\n * 将 Cline 消息数组转换为格式化的 Markdown 文档\r\n */\r\n\r\nimport { ClineTask, ClineMessage } from './cline-types';\r\nimport { Translator } from './i18n';\r\n\r\nexport class ClineMarkdownGenerator {\r\n    constructor(private t: Translator) {}\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 生成 Markdown 文档\r\n     */\r\n    generate(task: ClineTask, messages: ClineMessage[]): string {\r\n        let markdown = '';\r\n        \r\n        // 文件头\r\n        markdown += this.generateHeader(task);\r\n        markdown += '\\n\\n';\r\n        \r\n        // 标题\r\n        const title = task.metadata.task || this.t('markdown.untitled');\r\n        markdown += `# ${title}\\n\\n`;\r\n        \r\n        // 元信息\r\n        markdown += this.generateMetadata(task, messages);\r\n        markdown += '\\n\\n';\r\n        \r\n        markdown += '---\\n\\n';\r\n        \r\n        // 消息\r\n        let messageIndex = 1;\r\n        \r\n        for (const message of messages) {\r\n            // 发言者标题\r\n            markdown += this.generateSpeakerTitle(message, messageIndex);\r\n            markdown += '\\n\\n';\r\n            \r\n            // 消息内容\r\n            if (message.text.trim()) {\r\n                markdown += message.text.trim();\r\n                markdown += '\\n\\n';\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 图片（如果有）\r\n            if (message.images && message.images.length > 0) {\r\n                for (const img of message.images) {\r\n                    markdown += `${img}\\n\\n`;\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 工具调用（如果有）\r\n            if (message.toolUses && message.toolUses.length > 0) {\r\n                markdown += this.generateToolUses(message.toolUses);\r\n                markdown += '\\n\\n';\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 工具结果（如果有）\r\n            if (message.toolResults && message.toolResults.length > 0) {\r\n                markdown += this.generateToolResults(message.toolResults);\r\n                markdown += '\\n\\n';\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            markdown += '---\\n\\n';\r\n            \r\n            messageIndex++;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        return markdown.trim() + '\\n';\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 生成文件头\r\n     */\r\n    private generateHeader(task: ClineTask): string {\r\n        const locale = this.getLocale();\r\n        const source = locale === 'zh' ? 'Cline 任务' : 'Cline Task';\r\n        \r\n        return `<!-- ${this.t('markdown.generatedBy')} -->\r\n<!-- ${source}: ${task.id} -->\r\n<!-- ${this.t('markdown.cursorSession', {\r\n    id: task.id,\r\n    date: this.formatDate(new Date(task.metadata.ts).toISOString())\r\n})} -->`;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 生成元信息\r\n     */\r\n    private generateMetadata(task: ClineTask, messages: ClineMessage[]): string {\r\n        const userMsgCount = messages.filter(m => m.type === 'user').length;\r\n        const assistantMsgCount = messages.filter(m => m.type === 'assistant').length;\r\n        const createdDate = this.formatDate(new Date(task.metadata.ts).toISOString());\r\n        \r\n        const locale = this.getLocale();\r\n        \r\n        if (locale === 'zh') {\r\n            return `**创建时间**: ${createdDate}  \r\n**消息数量**: ${messages.length} 条 (用户: ${userMsgCount}, 助手: ${assistantMsgCount})  \r\n**Token 使用**: 输入 ${task.metadata.tokensIn}, 输出 ${task.metadata.tokensOut}  \r\n**总费用**: $${task.metadata.totalCost.toFixed(4)}  \r\n**任务ID**: \\`${task.id}\\``;\r\n        } else {\r\n            return `**Created**: ${createdDate}  \r\n**Messages**: ${messages.length} (User: ${userMsgCount}, Assistant: ${assistantMsgCount})  \r\n**Tokens**: In ${task.metadata.tokensIn}, Out ${task.metadata.tokensOut}  \r\n**Total Cost**: $${task.metadata.totalCost.toFixed(4)}  \r\n**Task ID**: \\`${task.id}\\``;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 生成发言者标题\r\n     */\r\n    private generateSpeakerTitle(message: ClineMessage, index: number): string {\r\n        const time = this.formatDate(message.timestamp);\r\n        \r\n        const locale = this.getLocale();\r\n        \r\n        if (message.type === 'user') {\r\n            const prefix = locale === 'zh' ? '💬 用户' : '💬 User';\r\n            return `## ${prefix} #${index}\\n\\n_${time}_`;\r\n        } else {\r\n            const prefix = locale === 'zh' ? '🤖 助手' : '🤖 Assistant';\r\n            return `## ${prefix} #${index}\\n\\n_${time}_`;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 生成工具调用\r\n     */\r\n    private generateToolUses(toolUses: any[]): string {\r\n        let markdown = '';\r\n        const locale = this.getLocale();\r\n        const title = locale === 'zh' ? '🔧 工具调用' : '🔧 Tool Uses';\r\n        \r\n        markdown += `**${title}** (${toolUses.length})\\n\\n`;\r\n        \r\n        for (const tool of toolUses) {\r\n            markdown += `<details>\\n<summary><strong>${tool.name}</strong></summary>\\n\\n`;\r\n            markdown += '```json\\n';\r\n            markdown += JSON.stringify(tool.input, null, 2);\r\n            markdown += '\\n```\\n';\r\n            markdown += `</details>\\n\\n`;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        return markdown.trim();\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 生成工具结果\r\n     */\r\n    private generateToolResults(toolResults: any[]): string {\r\n        let markdown = '';\r\n        const locale = this.getLocale();\r\n        const resultLabel = locale === 'zh' ? '📋 结果' : '📋 Result';\r\n        \r\n        for (const result of toolResults) {\r\n            const errorTag = result.isError ? ' ❌ ERROR' : '';\r\n            markdown += `<details>\\n<summary><strong>${resultLabel}${errorTag}</strong></summary>\\n\\n`;\r\n            \r\n            if (result.content) {\r\n                markdown += '```\\n';\r\n                markdown += result.content;\r\n                markdown += '\\n```\\n';\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            markdown += `</details>\\n\\n`;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        return markdown.trim();\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 获取当前语言环境\r\n     */\r\n    private getLocale(): string {\r\n        const testKey = this.t('mode.chat');\r\n        return testKey === '对话' ? 'zh' : 'en';\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 格式化日期为 UTC\r\n     */\r\n    private formatDate(isoDate: string): string {\r\n        const date = new Date(isoDate);\r\n        const year = date.getUTCFullYear();\r\n        const month = String(date.getUTCMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');\r\n        const day = String(date.getUTCDate()).padStart(2, '0');\r\n        const hour = String(date.getUTCHours()).padStart(2, '0');\r\n        const minute = String(date.getUTCMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');\r\n        \r\n        return `${year}-${month}-${day} ${hour}:${minute}Z`;\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n\r\n",

{
  "contents": "/**\n * Cline 工作区过滤器\n * 判断任务是否属于当前工作区\n */\n\nimport * as path from 'path';\nimport { ClineTask } from './cline-types';\n\nexport class ClineWorkspaceFilter {\n    private workspaceRoot: string;\n    \n    constructor(workspaceRoot: string) {\n        this.workspaceRoot = this.normalizePath(workspaceRoot);\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 判断任务是否属于当前工作区\n     */\n    belongsToCurrentWorkspace(task: ClineTask): boolean {\n        console.log('[DEBUG] ClineWorkspaceFilter.belongsToCurrentWorkspace()');\n        console.log('[DEBUG] Task ID:', task.id);\n        console.log('[DEBUG] Task workspaceRoot:', task.workspaceRoot);\n        console.log('[DEBUG] Current workspaceRoot:', this.workspaceRoot);\n        \n        // 如果任务有明确的工作区路径\n        if (task.workspaceRoot) {\n            const belongs = this.isSameOrSubPath(task.workspaceRoot, this.workspaceRoot);\n            console.log('[DEBUG] Task has explicit workspaceRoot, belongs:', belongs);\n            return belongs;\n        }\n        \n        console.log('[DEBUG] Task has no explicit workspaceRoot, checking UI messages');\n        \n        // 尝试从 UI messages 中查找路径线索\n        const uiMessages = task.uiMessages.messages || [];\n        console.log('[DEBUG] UI messages count:', uiMessages.length);\n        \n        for (const msg of uiMessages) {\n            // 检查文件路径\n            if (msg.path) {\n                const normalizedPath = this.normalizePath(msg.path);\n                console.log('[DEBUG] Checking message path:', msg.path, '-> normalized:', normalizedPath);\n                if (this.isSameOrSubPath(normalizedPath, this.workspaceRoot)) {\n                    console.log('[DEBUG] Found matching path in UI messages');\n                    return true;\n                }\n            }\n            \n            // 检查命令执行路径\n            if (msg.command && typeof msg.command === 'string') {\n                // 命令可能包含路径信息\n                if (msg.command.includes(this.workspaceRoot)) {\n                    console.log('[DEBUG] Found matching path in command');\n                    return true;\n                }\n            }\n        }\n        \n        // 如果无法确定，采用包容策略（返回 true）\n        // 这样可以确保任务不会被意外过滤掉\n        console.log('[DEBUG] No explicit workspace match found, using inclusive policy (returning true)');\n        return true;\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 判断路径是否相同或为子路径\n     */\n    private isSameOrSubPath(targetPath: string, basePath: string): boolean {\n        const normalizedTarget = this.normalizePath(targetPath);\n        const normalizedBase = this.normalizePath(basePath);\n        \n        // 完全匹配\n        if (normalizedTarget === normalizedBase) {\n            return true;\n        }\n        \n        // 检查是否为子路径\n        return normalizedTarget.startsWith(normalizedBase + path.sep);\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 规范化路径\n     */\n    private normalizePath(p: string): string {\n        // 转换为绝对路径并规范化\n        let normalized = path.resolve(p);\n        \n        // 统一路径分隔符（Windows）\n        normalized = normalized.replace(/\\\\/g, '/');\n        \n        // 移除尾部斜杠\n        if (normalized.endsWith('/') && normalized.length > 1) {\n            normalized = normalized.slice(0, -1);\n        }\n        \n        return normalized.toLowerCase();\n    }\n}\n\n",

{
  "contents": "/**\n * Cline 文件监听器\n * 监听 Cline 任务文件变化并自动同步\n */\n\nimport * as chokidar from 'chokidar';\nimport * as vscode from 'vscode';\nimport * as path from 'path';\nimport { ClineReader } from './cline-reader';\nimport { ClineConversationBuilder } from './cline-conversation-builder';\nimport { ClineMarkdownGenerator } from './cline-markdown-generator';\nimport { HistorySaver } from './history-saver';\nimport { ClineWorkspaceFilter } from './cline-workspace-filter';\nimport { createTranslator, LocaleSetting, Translator } from './i18n';\n\nexport class ClineWatcher {\n    private watcher: chokidar.FSWatcher | null = null;\n    private storageDir: string;\n    private lastSync: number = 0;\n    private debounceTimer: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\n    private workspaceRoot: string;\n    private workspaceFilter: ClineWorkspaceFilter;\n    private t: Translator;\n    \n    constructor(storageDir: string, workspaceRoot: string, localeSetting?: LocaleSetting) {\n        this.storageDir = storageDir;\n        this.workspaceRoot = workspaceRoot;\n        this.workspaceFilter = new ClineWorkspaceFilter(workspaceRoot);\n        this.t = createTranslator(localeSetting);\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 启动监听\n     */\n    start(): void {\n        console.log('[DEBUG] ClineWatcher.start() called');\n        console.log('[DEBUG] Storage dir:', this.storageDir);\n        console.log('[DEBUG] Workspace root:', this.workspaceRoot);\n        \n        // 1. 立即执行一次同步\n        console.log('[DEBUG] Calling syncNow() immediately');\n        this.syncNow();\n        \n        // 2. 监听任务目录变化\n        const tasksDir = path.join(this.storageDir, 'tasks');\n        const stateDir = path.join(this.storageDir, 'state');\n        \n        console.log('[DEBUG] Watching directories:', { tasksDir, stateDir });\n        \n        this.watcher = chokidar.watch(\n            [tasksDir, stateDir],\n            {\n                persistent: true,\n                ignoreInitial: true,\n                depth: 2, // 监听子目录\n                awaitWriteFinish: {\n                    stabilityThreshold: 500,\n                    pollInterval: 100\n                }\n            }\n        );\n        \n        this.watcher.on('add', (filePath) => {\n            console.log('Cline file added:', filePath);\n            this.scheduleSync();\n        });\n        \n        this.watcher.on('change', (filePath) => {\n            console.log('Cline file changed:', filePath);\n            this.scheduleSync();\n        });\n        \n        this.watcher.on('error', (error) => {\n            console.error('[DEBUG] Cline watcher error:', error);\n        });\n        \n        // 3. 定时轮询（兜底，每 2 分钟）\n        setInterval(() => {\n            console.log('[DEBUG] Periodic sync triggered');\n            this.syncNow();\n        }, 120000); // 2 分钟\n        \n        console.log('Cline watcher started for:', this.storageDir);\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 停止监听\n     */\n    stop(): void {\n        if (this.watcher) {\n            this.watcher.close();\n        }\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\n        }\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 调度同步（防抖）\n     */\n    private scheduleSync(): void {\n        // 防抖：2 秒内只执行一次\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\n        }\n        \n        this.debounceTimer = setTimeout(() => {\n            this.syncNow();\n        }, 2000);\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 立即同步\n     */\n    syncNow(): void {\n        const now = Date.now();\n        \n        // 避免过于频繁的同步\n        if (now - this.lastSync < 1000) {\n            return;\n        }\n        \n        this.lastSync = now;\n        \n        this.performSync().catch(error => {\n            console.error('Cline sync failed:', error);\n        });\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 执行同步\n     */\n    private async performSync(): Promise<void> {\n        console.log('[DEBUG] performSync() started');\n        const reader = new ClineReader(this.storageDir);\n        \n        // 检查存储目录是否存在\n        if (!reader.exists()) {\n            console.warn('[DEBUG] Cline storage directory not found:', this.storageDir);\n            return;\n        }\n        \n        console.log('[DEBUG] Cline storage directory exists');\n        \n        try {\n            // 获取所有任务\n            const tasks = reader.getAllTasks();\n            \n            console.log(`[DEBUG] Found ${tasks.length} Cline tasks`);\n            \n            if (tasks.length === 0) {\n                console.log('[DEBUG] No tasks found, skipping sync');\n                return;\n            }\n            \n            for (const task of tasks) {\n                console.log(`[DEBUG] Processing task: ${task.id}`);\n                console.log(`[DEBUG] Task workspace: ${task.workspaceRoot}`);\n                console.log(`[DEBUG] Current workspace: ${this.workspaceRoot}`);\n                \n                // 只处理属于当前工作区的任务\n                const belongsToWorkspace = this.workspaceFilter.belongsToCurrentWorkspace(task);\n                \n                console.log(`[DEBUG] Task belongs to workspace: ${belongsToWorkspace}`);\n                \n                if (!belongsToWorkspace) {\n                    console.log(`[DEBUG] Skipping task ${task.id} - not in current workspace`);\n                    continue;\n                }\n                \n                // 构建对话\n                const builder = new ClineConversationBuilder(this.t);\n                const messages = builder.buildConversation(task);\n                \n                console.log(`[DEBUG] Built ${messages.length} messages for task ${task.id}`);\n                \n                if (messages.length === 0) {\n                    console.log(`[DEBUG] No messages in task ${task.id}, skipping`);\n                    continue;\n                }\n                \n                // 生成 Markdown\n                const generator = new ClineMarkdownGenerator(this.t);\n                const markdown = generator.generate(task, messages);\n                \n                console.log(`[DEBUG] Generated markdown (${markdown.length} chars) for task ${task.id}`);\n                \n                // 保存\n                const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n                const outputDir = config.get<string>('outputDirectory', '.llm-chat-history');\n                \n                console.log(`[DEBUG] Output directory: ${outputDir}`);\n                \n                const saver = new HistorySaver(this.workspaceRoot, outputDir);\n                \n                // 使用任务元数据创建 composer 兼容对象\n                const composerLike = {\n                    composerId: task.id,\n                    name: task.metadata.task,\n                    createdAt: new Date(task.metadata.ts).toISOString()\n                };\n                \n                console.log(`[DEBUG] Saving task ${task.id} as: ${composerLike.name}`);\n                const savedPath = await saver.save(composerLike as any, markdown);\n                console.log(`[DEBUG] Saved to: ${savedPath}`);\n            }\n            \n            console.log('[DEBUG] Cline sync completed successfully');\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('[DEBUG] Error during Cline sync:', error);\n            console.error('[DEBUG] Stack trace:', (error as Error).stack);\n            throw error;\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n",

# 爬虫脚本\\n│   │   ├── community_spider.py    # 小区爬虫\\n│   │   ├── house_spider.py        # 房源爬虫\\n│   │   └── price_spider.py        # 价格走势爬虫\\n│   ├── middlewares/         # 中间件\\n│   │   ├── proxy_middleware.py    # 代理中间件\\n│   │   ├── useragent_middleware.py # UA中间件\\n│   │   ├── cookie_middleware.py   # Cookie中间件\\n│   │   └── retry_middleware.py    # 重试中间件\\n│   ├── pipelines/           # 数据管道\\n│   │   ├── clean_pipeline.py      # 数据清洗\\n│   │   ├── duplicate_pipeline.py  # 去重\\n│   │   ├── mongo_pipeline.py      # MongoDB存储\\n│   │   └── export_pipeline.py     # 文件导出\\n│   ├── items/               # 数据模型\\n│   │   ├── community_item.py      # 小区数据模型\\n│   │   ├── house_item.py          # 房源数据模型\\n│   │   └── price_item.py          # 价格数据模型\\n│   ├── utils/               # 工具函数\\n│   │   ├── crypto.py              # 加密解密\\n│   │   ├── captcha.py             # 验证码识别\\n│   │   ├── login.py               # 登录管理\\n│   │   └── proxy_pool.py          # 代理池管理\\n│   └── settings.py          # Scrapy配置\\n├── data/                    # 数据存储目录\\n│   ├── raw/                 # 原始数据\\n│   ├── processed/           # 处理后数据\\n│   └── exports/             # 导出数据\\n├── logs/                    # 日志目录\\n├── sessions/                # Session存储\\n├── tests/                   # 测试文件\\n├── notebooks/               # Jupyter分析笔记本\\n├── docs/                    # 文档\\n│   └── API.md               # 接口文档\\n├── requirements.txt         # 依赖包\\n├── scrapy.cfg              # Scrapy配置\\n├── PLAN.md                 # 详细实施计划\\n└── README.md               # 项目说明\\n```\\n\\n## 🚀 快速开始\\n\\n### 1. 环境要求\\n\\n- Python 3.10+\\n- MongoDB 4.0+ (可选)\\n- Redis 5.0+ (可选)\\n\\n### 2. 安装依赖\\n\\n**推荐使用 Python 3.10 或 3.11** （Python 3.13 可能有兼容性问题）\\n\\n**方式 A: 快速启动脚本（推荐）**\\n```bash\\n# Windows\\nquick_start.bat\\n\\n# Linux/Mac\\nbash quick_start.sh\\n```\\n\\n**方式 B: 手动安装**\\n```bash\\n# 克隆项目\\ngit clone https://github.com/your-username/lianjia-spider.git\\ncd lianjia-spider\\n\\n# 创建虚拟环境\\npython -m venv venv\\nsource venv/bin/activate  # Windows: venv\\\\Scripts\\\\activate\\n\\n# 升级 pip\\npython -m pip install --upgrade pip\\n\\n# 安装依赖\\npip install -r requirements.txt\\n\\n# 如果安装失败，使用国内镜像\\npip install -r requirements.txt -i https://pypi.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/simple\\n\\n# 安装Playwright浏览器\\nplaywright install chromium\\n```\\n\\n**遇到安装问题？**\\n- 查看详细安装指南: [INSTALL.md](INSTALL.md)\\n- 运行环境检查: `python check_env.py`\\n- 使用最小化安装: `pip install -r requirements-minimal.txt`\\n\\n### 3. 配置项目\\n\\n```bash\\n# 复制配置文件\\ncp config/settings.example.py config/settings.py\\ncp config/accounts.example.json config/accounts.json\\ncp config/proxies.example.txt config/proxies.txt\\n\\n# 编辑配置文件，填入你的代理IP、账号等信息\\n# 主要配置项：\\n# - TARGET_CITY: 目标城市\\n# - MONGO_URI: MongoDB连接地址\\n# - PROXY_FILE: 代理IP文件路径\\n# - ACCOUNTS_FILE: 账号池文件路径\\n```\\n\\n### 4. 运行爬虫\\n\\n```bash\\n# 爬取小区列表\\nscrapy crawl community -a city=beijing\\n\\n# 爬取指定小区的房源\\nscrapy crawl house -a community=\\\"望京花园\\\"\\n\\n# 爬取价格走势\\nscrapy crawl price -a community_id=\\\"12345\\\"\\n```\\n\\n### 5. 数据导出\\n\\n```bash\\n# 导出为CSV\\npython utils/export_data.py --collection communities --format csv --output data/communities.csv\\n\\n# 导出为JSON\\npython utils/export_data.py --collection houses --format json --output data/houses.json\\n\\n# 导出为Excel\\npython utils/export_data.py --collection houses --format excel --output data/houses.xlsx\\n```\\n\\n## 📊 数据结构\\n\\n### 小区数据 (Community)\\n\\n```json\\n{\\n  \\\"id\\\": \\\"12345\\\",\\n  \\\"name\\\": \\\"望京花园\\\",\\n  \\\"district\\\": \\\"朝阳\\\",\\n  \\\"bizcircle\\\": \\\"望京\\\",\\n  \\\"address\\\": \\\"北京市朝阳区望京街道\\\",\\n  \\\"build_year\\\": 2000,\\n  \\\"house_count\\\": 1200,\\n  \\\"avg_price\\\": 65000,\\n  \\\"coordinate\\\": {\\n    \\\"lat\\\": 39.995,\\n    \\\"lng\\\": 116.470\\n  },\\n  \\\"crawl_time\\\": \\\"2025-12-02 10:00:00\\\"\\n}\\n```\\n\\n### 房源数据 (House)\\n\\n```json\\n{\\n  \\\"id\\\": \\\"67890\\\",\\n  \\\"community_id\\\": \\\"12345\\\",\\n  \\\"title\\\": \\\"望京花园 精装两居室 南北通透\\\",\\n  \\\"price\\\": 550,\\n  \\\"unit_price\\\": 68750,\\n  \\\"area\\\": 80,\\n  \\\"room\\\": \\\"2室1厅\\\",\\n  \\\"floor\\\": \\\"中楼层/共20层\\\",\\n  \\\"orientation\\\": \\\"南北\\\",\\n  \\\"decoration\\\": \\\"精装\\\",\\n  \\\"publish_time\\\": \\\"2025-12-01\\\",\\n  \\\"tags\\\": [\\\"满五唯一\\\", \\\"地铁房\\\", \\\"学区房\\\"],\\n  \\\"description\\\": \\\"...\\\",\\n  \\\"crawl_time\\\": \\\"2025-12-02 10:00:00\\\"\\n}\\n```\\n\\n### 价格走势 (PriceTrend)\\n\\n```json\\n{\\n  \\\"community_id\\\": \\\"12345\\\",\\n  \\\"date\\\": \\\"2025-11\\\",\\n  \\\"avg_price\\\": 65000,\\n  \\\"deal_count\\\": 15,\\n  \\\"list_count\\\": 80,\\n  \\\"crawl_time\\\": \\\"2025-12-02 10:00:00\\\"\\n}\\n```\\n\\n## 🛡️ 反爬对抗策略\\n\\n### 1. IP封禁应对\\n- 使用代理池，自动轮换IP\\n- 支持多种代理源（文件、API）\\n- 自动检测和剔除失效代理\\n\\n### 2. 请求头伪装\\n- 随机User-Agent\\n- 完整的浏览器请求头\\n- Cookie自动管理\\n\\n### 3. 登录态管理\\n- 账号池轮换\\n- Session持久化\\n- 自动登录和重登\\n\\n### 4. 验证码处理\\n- OCR自动识别（ddddocr）\\n- 人工打码平台（可选）\\n- 验证码触发降频\\n\\n### 5. 接口加密破解\\n- JavaScript逆向分析\\n- 参数加密算法复现\\n- 签名生成\\n\\n## 📈 监控与日志\\n\\n### 查看爬取统计\\n```bash\\n# 实时监控\\ntail -f logs/scrapy.log\\n\\n# 统计信息\\npython utils/stats.py\\n```\\n\\n### 日志级别\\n- `DEBUG`: 详细调试信息\\n- `INFO`: 一般信息\\n- `WARNING`: 警告信息\\n- `ERROR`: 错误信息\\n\\n## 🔧 高级功能\\n\\n### 分布式爬取\\n```python\\n# 使用Scrapy-Redis实现分布式\\n# 详见文档: docs/distributed.md\\n```\\n\\n### 数据分析\\n```python\\n# Jupyter Notebook分析示例\\n# 详见: notebooks/analysis.ipynb\\n```\\n\\n### 定时任务\\n```bash\\n# 使用crontab设置定时爬取\\n0 2 * * * cd /path/to/lianjia-spider && scrapy crawl house\\n```\\n\\n## ⚠️ 注意事项\\n\\n1. **法律合规**\\n   - 仅用于个人学习研究\\n   - 不得用于商业目的\\n   - 尊重网站服务条款\\n\\n2. **爬取频率**\\n   - 建议设置3秒以上延迟\\n   - 避免高并发请求\\n   - 夜间爬取降低影响\\n\\n3. **数据使用**\\n   - 运行调试脚本\\npython debug_crawler.py\\n\\n# 3. 输入小区名称\\n# 例如：世纪公园、陆家嘴、金桥等\\n```\\n\\n📖 **详细说明：** [如何使用调试脚本.md](如何使用调试脚本.md)\\n\\n---\\n\\n## ✅ 所有问题已修复\\n\\n我已经修复了以下所有问题：\\n1. ✅ DealRecordItem 导入错误\\n2. ✅ 中间件路径错误  \\n3. ✅ Pipeline 路径错误\\n4. ✅ ddddocr/Pillow 可选依赖问题\\n\\n## 📋 完整框架测试（3步走）\\n\\n### 第 1 步：测试导入\\n\\n```bash\\npython test_import.py\\n```\\n\\n如果全部显示 ✓，说明环境正常。\\n\\n### 第 2 如果第2步失败\\n\\n### 可能原因 1: 找不到网页\\n\\n**原因：** 链家网站结构可能已变化\\n\\n**解决：** 这是正常的，需要实际抓包分析更新选择器\\n\\n```bash\\n# 先测试网络连接\\ncurl https://bj.lianjia.com/xiaoqu/\\n```\\n\\n### 可能原因 2: 代理配置错误\\n\\n**解决：** 确保 `config/settings.py` 中设置：\\n\\n```python\\nUSE_PROXY = False  # 首次测试禁用代理\\n```\\n\\n### 可能原因 3: MongoDB 连接失败\\n\\n**解决：** 使用文件导出，不使用数据库：\\n\\n```bash\\n# 直接导出到 JSON，不经过 Pipeline\\nscrapy crawl house -a city=beijing -o test.json\\n```\\n\\n## 🔧 推荐的首次配置\\n\\n编辑 `config/settings.py`：\\n\\n```python\\n# 1. 禁用不需要的功能（首次测试）\\nUSE_PROXY = False          # 禁用代理\\nREQUIRE_LOGIN = False      # 禁用登录\\n\\n# 2. 降低请求频率（避免被封）\\nDOWNLOAD_DELAY = 5         # 5秒延迟\\nCONCURRENT_REQUESTS = 2    # 只用2个并发\\n\\n# 3. 简化 Pipeline（只保留清洗和去重）\\nITEM_PIPELINES = {\\n    'lianjia_spider.pipelines.clean_pipeline.DataCleanPipeline': 100,\\n    'lianjia_spider.pipelines.duplicate_pipeline.DuplicatesPipeline': 200,\\n    # 'lianjia_spider.pipelines.mongo_pipeline.MongoPipeline': 300,  # 注释掉\\n}\\n\\n# 4. 设置日志级别\\nLOG_LEVEL = 'INFO'\\n```\\n\\n## 📝 完整的工作流程\\n\\n### 方式 1: 使用启动脚本（推荐）\\n\\n```bash\\n# 爬取小区数据\\npython run_spider.py community --city beijing --output data/communities.json\\n\\n# 爬取房源数据\\npython run_spider.py house --city shanghai --district pudong --output data/houses.json\\n```\\n\\n### 方式 2: 使用 Scrapy 命令\\n\\n```bash\\n# 爬取并导出\\nscrapy crawl house -a city=beijing -o data/houses.json\\n\\n# 只爬不存储（测试用）\\nscrapy crawl house -a city=beijing -s LOG_LEVEL=DEBUG\\n```\\n\\n### 方式 3: Python 脚本\\n\\n```python\\n# 创建 run_my_spider.py\\nfrom scrapy.crawler import CrawlerProcess\\nfrom scrapy.utils.project import get_project_settings\\n\\nprocess = CrawlerProcess(get_project_settings())\\nprocess.crawl('house', city='beijing')\\nprocess.start()\\n```\\n\\n## ⚠️ 重要提示\\n\\n### 关于网页结构\\n\\n**当前代码中的选择器可能已过时！**\\n\\n链家网站会经常更新页面结构，所以：\\n\\n1. = urljoin(self.base_url, next_page)\\r\\n            self.logger.info(f\\\"下一页: {next_url}\\\")\\r\\n            yield self.make_request(\\r\\n                url=next_url,\\r\\n Base64编码的加密数据\\r\\n            \\r\\n        Returns:\\r\\n            解密后的字符串\\r\\n        \\\"\\\"\\\"\\r\\n        try:\\r\\n            encrypted = base64.b64decode(encrypted_data)\\r\\n Exception as e:\\r\\n            print(f\\\"AES解密失败: {e}\\\")\\r\\n            return \\\"\\\"\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\ndef generate_sign(params: Dict[str, Any], secret: str = \\\"lianjia_secret\\\") -> str:\\r\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"\\r\\n    生成接口签名\\r\\n    \\r\\n    链家接口通常需要签名验证，签名算法需要通过逆向分析获取\\r\\n    这里提供一个通用的签名生成模板\\r\\n    \\r\\n    Args:\\r\\n        params: 请求参数字典\\r\\n        secret: 签名密钥\\r\\n        \\r\\n    Returns:\\r\\n        签名字符串\\r\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"\\r\\n    # 1. 按key排序\\r\\n    sorted_params = sorted(params.items(), key=lambda x: x[0])\\r\\n    \\r\\n    # 2. 拼接参数\\r\\n    param_str = '&'.join([f\\\"{k}={v}\\\" for k, v in sorted_params])\\r\\n    \\r\\n    # 3. 添加密钥\\r\\n    sign_str = f\\\"{param_str}&secret={secret}\\\"\\r\\n    \\r\\n    # 4. MD5加密\\r\\n    md5 = hashlib.md5()\\r\\n    md5.update(sign_str.encode('utf-8'))\\r\\n    signature = md5.hexdigest().upper()\\r\\n    \\r\\n    return signature\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\ndef generate_timestamp() -> int:\\r\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"生成时间戳（毫秒）\\\"\\\"\\\"\\r\\n    return int(time.time() * 1000)\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\ndef generate_nonce(length: int = 32) -> str:\\r\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"\\r\\n    生成随机字符串\\r\\n    \\r\\n    Args:\\r\\n        length: 字符串长度\\r\\n        \\r\\n    Returns:\\r\\n        随机字符串\\r\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"\\r\\n    import random\\r\\n    import string\\r\\n    chars = string.ascii_letters + string.digits\\r\\n    return ''.join(random.choice(chars) for _ in range(length))\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\ndef encrypt_params(params: Dict[str, Any], crypto_helper: CryptoHelper = None) -> Dict[str, Any]:\\r\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"\\r\\n    加密请求参数\\r\\n    \\r\\n    实际使用时需要根据链家的加密逻辑进行调整\\r\\n    \\r\\n    Args:\\r\\n        params: 原始参数\\r\\n        crypto_helper: 加密辅助对象\\r\\n        \\r\\n    Returns:\\r\\n        加密后的参数\\r\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"\\r\\n    if crypto_helper is None:\\r\\n        crypto_helper = CryptoHelper()\\r\\n    \\r\\n    # 添加时间戳和随机数\\r\\n    params['timestamp'] = generate_timestamp()\\r\\n    params['nonce'] = generate_nonce()\\r\\n    \\r\\n    # 生成签名\\r\\n    params['sign'] = generate_sign(params)\\r\\n    \\r\\n    # 如果需要对整个参数进行加密\\r\\n    # encrypted_data = crypto_helper.aes_encrypt(json.dumps(params))\\r\\n    # return {'data': encrypted_data}\\r\\n    \\r\\n    return params\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\ndef decrypt_data(encrypted_data: str, crypto_helper: CryptoHelper = None) -> Dict[str, Any]:\\r\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"\\r\\n    解密响应数据\\r\\n    \\r\\n    Args:\\r\\n        encrypted_data: 加密的响应数据\\r\\n        crypto_helper: 加密辅助对象\\r\\n        \\r\\n    Returns:\\r\\n        解密后的数据\\r\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"\\r\\n    if crypto_helper is None:\\r\\n        crypto_helper = CryptoHelper()\\r\\n    \\r\\n    decrypted = crypto_helper.aes_decrypt(encrypted_data)\\r\\n    \\r\\n    try:\\r\\n        return json.loads(decrypted)\\r\\n    except:\\r\\n        return {}\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\ndef md5_hash(text: str) -> str:\\r\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"MD5哈希\\\"\\\"\\\"\\r\\n    return hashlib.md5(text.encode('utf-8')).hexdigest()\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\ndef sha256_hash(text: str) -> str:\\r\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"SHA256哈希\\\"\\\"\\\"\\r\\n    return hashlib.sha256(text.encode('utf-8')).hexdigest()\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n# 使用示例\\r\\nif __name__ == \\\"__main__\\\":\\r\\n    # 测试加密解密\\r\\n    helper = CryptoHelper()\\r\\n    \\r\\n    original = \\\"Hello, Lianjia!\\\"\\r\\n    encrypted = helper.aes_encrypt(original)\\r\\n    decrypted = helper.aes_decrypt(encrypted)\\r\\n    \\r\\n    print(f\\\"原始数据: {original}\\\")\\r\\n    print(f\\\"加密数据: {encrypted}\\\")\\r\\n    print(f\\\"解密数据: {decrypted}\\\")\\r\\n    \\r\\n    # 测试签名生成\\r\\n    params = {\\r\\n        'city': 'beijing',\\r\\n        'district': 'chaoyang',\\r\\n        'page': 1\\r\\n    }\\r\\n    \\r\\n    sign = generate_sign(params)\\r\\n    print(f\\\"\\\\n参数签名: {sign}\\\")\\r\\n    \\r\\n    # 测试参数加密\\r\\n    encrypted_params = encrypt_params(params)\\r\\n    print(f\\\"\\\\n加密参数: {encrypted_params}\\\")\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n\"},{\"type\":\"text\",\"text\":\"\\n\\n\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t# TODO LIST UPDATE REQUIRED - You MUST include the task_progress parameter in your NEXT tool call.\\n\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t**Current Progress: 6/6 items completed (100%)**\\n\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\n\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t- [x] 阅读主要文档文件\\n- [x] 分析项目结构\\n- [x] 检查依赖和配置\\n- [x] 查看爬虫实现\\n- [x] 分析数据处理管道\\n- [x] 总结项目功能和特点\\n\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t**CRITICAL INFORMATION:** The user has modified this todo list - review ALL changes carefully\\n\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\n1. 房产小区、房源信息、价格走势\\n- **支持城市**: 北京、上海、广州、深圳等\\n\\n### 🏗️ 技术架构\\n\\n#### 核心框架\\n- **Scrapy**: 专业爬虫框架，提供完整的爬取生命周期管理\\n- **Playwright**: 处理动态JavaScript渲染的页面\\n- **数据存储**: 支持MongoDB、Redis、MySQL、文件等多种存储方式\\n\\n#### 项目结构分析\\n```\\nlianjia_spider/\\n├── spiders/          # 爬虫实现 (小区爬虫、房源爬虫、价格爬虫)\\n├── middlewares/      # 中间件 (代理、User-Agent、Cookie、重试等)\\n├── pipelines/        # 数据管道 (清洗、去重、存储、导出)\\n├── items/           # 数据模型定义\\n├── utils/           # 工具函数 (加密、验证码、登录、代理池)\\n└── settings.py      # 配置管理\\n```\\n\\n### 🛡️ 反爬对抗机制\\n\\n项目实现了**完整的反爬对抗体系**：\\n\\n1. **IP伪装**\\n   - 代理池管理 (文件/API两种方式)\\n   - 自动代理轮换和失效检测\\n\\n2. **请求头伪装**\\n   - User-Agent自动轮换\\n   - 完整的浏览器请求头模拟\\n\\n3. **会话管理**\\n   - Cookie自动管理\\n   - 账号池轮换登录\\n   - Session持久化\\n\\n4. **频率控制**\\n   - 可配置的请求延迟\\n   - 随机延迟避免检测\\n   - 并发数限制\\n\\n5. **验证码处理**\\n   - OCR自动识别 (ddddocr)\\n   - 打码平台支持 (2captcha等)\\n   - 验证码触发降频\\n\\n6. **接口加密破解**\\n   - AES加密解密工具\\n   - 签名算法逆向\\n   - 参数加密处理\\n\\n### 📈 **DuplicatesPipeline**: 数据去重 (基于Redis)\\n3. **MongoPipeline**: MongoDB存储\\n4. **ExportPipeline**: 文件导出 (JSON/CSV/Excel)\\n\\n#### 数据质量\\n- 自动数据类型转换\\n- 缺失值处理\\n- 字符串规范化\\n- 数值字段验证\\n\\n### 🔧 for 'README.md'] Result:\\\\n# 链家网站数据爬取项目\\\\n\\\\n⚠️ **重要声明：本项目仅供学习和研究使用，请勿用于商业目的或侵犯他人权益。**\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 🚀 快速开始\\\\n\\\\n**第一次使用？** 👉 [从这里开始 START_HERE.md](START_HERE.md)\\\\n\\\\n**遇到问题？** 👉 [修复完成说明.md](修复完成说明.md)\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 📋 项目概述\\\\n\\\\n本项目旨在爬取链家网站的房产数据，主要包括：\\\\n- 特定小区的房源列表\\\\n- 房源详细特征（户型、面积、价格等）\\\\n- 历史价格走势\\\\n- 成交记录\\\\n\\\\n## 🎯 核心功能\\\\n\\\\n- ✅ 完整的反爬对抗机制（代理池、User-Agent轮换、Cookie管理）\\\\n- ✅ 支持登录态管理和验证码识别\\\\n- ✅ 接口加密破解（逆向分析）\\\\n- ✅ 动态页面渲染（Playwright支持）\\\\n- ✅ 数据持久化（MongoDB/MySQL）\\\\n- ✅ 完善的日志和监控系统\\\\n- ✅ 增量更新和断点续爬\\\\n\\\\n## 📂 项目结构\\\\n\\\\n```\\\\nlianjia-spider/\\\\n├── config/                  # 配置文件目录\\\\n│   ├── settings.example.py  # 配置模板\\\\n│   ├── accounts.example.json # 账号池模板\\\\n│   └── proxies.example.txt  # 代理池模板\\\\n├── lianjia_spider/          # Scrapy项目主目录\\\\n│   ├── spiders/             # 爬虫脚本\\\\n│   │   ├── community_spider.py    # 小区爬虫\\\\n│   │   ├── house_spider.py        # 房源爬虫\\\\n│   │   └── price_spider.py        # 价格走势爬虫\\\\n│   ├── middlewares/         # 中间件\\\\n│   │   ├── proxy_middleware.py    # 代理中间件\\\\n│   │   ├── useragent_middleware.py # UA中间件\\\\n│   │   ├── cookie_middleware.py   # Cookie中间件\\\\n│   │   └── retry_middleware.py    # 重试中间件\\\\n│   ├── pipelines/           # 数据管道\\\\n│   │   ├── clean_pipeline.py      # 数据清洗\\\\n│   │   ├── duplicate_pipeline.py  # 去重\\\\n│   │   ├── mongo_pipeline.py      # MongoDB存储\\\\n│   │   └── export_pipeline.py     # 文件导出\\\\n│   ├── items/               # 数据模型\\\\n│   │   ├── community_item.py      # 小区数据模型\\\\n│   │   ├── house_item.py          # 房源数据模型\\\\n│   │   └── price_item.py          # 价格数据模型\\\\n│   ├── utils/               # 工具函数\\\\n│   │   ├── crypto.py              # 加密解密\\\\n│   │   ├── captcha.py             # 验证码识别\\\\n│   │   ├── login.py               # 登录管理\\\\n│   │   └── proxy_pool.py          # 代理池管理\\\\n│   └── settings.py          # Scrapy配置\\\\n├── data/                    # 数据存储目录\\\\n│   ├── raw/                 # 原始数据\\\\n│   ├── processed/           # 处理后数据\\\\n│   └── exports/             # 导出数据\\\\n├── logs/                    # 日志目录\\\\n├── sessions/                # Session存储\\\\n├── tests/                   # 测试文件\\\\n├── notebooks/               # Jupyter分析笔记本\\\\n├── docs/                    # 文档\\\\n│   └── API.md               # 接口文档\\\\n├── requirements.txt         # 依赖包\\\\n├── scrapy.cfg              # Scrapy配置\\\\n├── PLAN.md                 # 详细实施计划\\\\n└── README.md               # 项目说明\\\\n```\\\\n\\\\n## 🚀 快速开始\\\\n\\\\n### 1. 环境要求\\\\n\\\\n- Python 3.10+\\\\n- MongoDB 4.0+ (可选)\\\\n- Redis 5.0+ (可选)\\\\n\\\\n### 2. 安装依赖\\\\n\\\\n**推荐使用 Python 3.10 或 3.11** （Python 3.13 可能有兼容性问题）\\\\n\\\\n**方式 A: 快速启动脚本（推荐）**\\\\n```bash\\\\n# Windows\\\\nquick_start.bat\\\\n\\\\n# Linux/Mac\\\\nbash quick_start.sh\\\\n```\\\\n\\\\n**方式 B: 手动安装**\\\\n```bash\\\\n# 克隆项目\\\\ngit clone https://github.com/your-username/lianjia-spider.git\\\\ncd lianjia-spider\\\\n\\\\n# 创建虚拟环境\\\\npython -m venv venv\\\\nsource venv/bin/activate  # Windows: venv\\\\\\\\Scripts\\\\\\\\activate\\\\n\\\\n# 升级 pip\\\\npython -m pip install --upgrade pip\\\\n\\\\n# 安装依赖\\\\npip install -r requirements.txt\\\\n\\\\n# 如果安装失败，使用国内镜像\\\\npip install -r requirements.txt -i https://pypi.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/simple\\\\n\\\\n# 安装Playwright浏览器\\\\nplaywright install chromium\\\\n```\\\\n\\\\n**遇到安装问题？**\\\\n- 查看详细安装指南: [INSTALL.md](INSTALL.md)\\\\n- 运行环境检查: `python check_env.py`\\\\n- 使用最小化安装: `pip install -r requirements-minimal.txt`\\\\n\\\\n### 3. 配置项目\\\\n\\\\n```bash\\\\n# 复制配置文件\\\\ncp config/settings.example.py config/settings.py\\\\ncp config/accounts.example.json config/accounts.json\\\\ncp config/proxies.example.txt config/proxies.txt\\\\n\\\\n# 编辑配置文件，填入你的代理IP、账号等信息\\\\n# 主要配置项：\\\\n# - TARGET_CITY: 目标城市\\\\n# - MONGO_URI: MongoDB连接地址\\\\n# - PROXY_FILE: 代理IP文件路径\\\\n# - ACCOUNTS_FILE: 账号池文件路径\\\\n```\\\\n\\\\n### 4. 运行爬虫\\\\n\\\\n```bash\\\\n# 爬取小区列表\\\\nscrapy crawl community -a city=beijing\\\\n\\\\n# 爬取指定小区的房源\\\\nscrapy crawl house -a community=\\\\\\\"望京花园\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n# 爬取价格走势\\\\nscrapy crawl price -a community_id=\\\\\\\"12345\\\\\\\"\\\\n```\\\\n\\\\n### 5. 数据导出\\\\n\\\\n```bash\\\\n# 导出为CSV\\\\npython utils/export_data.py --collection communities --format csv --output data/communities.csv\\\\n\\\\n# 导出为JSON\\\\npython utils/export_data.py --collection houses --format json --output data/houses.json\\\\n\\\\n# 导出为Excel\\\\npython utils/export_data.py --collection houses --format excel --output data/houses.xlsx\\\\n```\\\\n\\\\n## 📊 数据结构\\\\n\\\\n### 小区数据 (Community)\\\\n\\\\n```json\\\\n{\\\\n  \\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"12345\\\\\\\",\\\\n  \\\\\\\"name\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"望京花园\\\\\\\",\\\\n  \\\\\\\"district\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"朝阳\\\\\\\",\\\\n  \\\\\\\"bizcircle\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"望京\\\\\\\",\\\\n  \\\\\\\"address\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"北京市朝阳区望京街道\\\\\\\",\\\\n  \\\\\\\"build_year\\\\\\\": 2000,\\\\n  \\\\\\\"house_count\\\\\\\": 1200,\\\\n  \\\\\\\"avg_price\\\\\\\": 65000,\\\\n  \\\\\\\"coordinate\\\\\\\": {\\\\n    \\\\\\\"lat\\\\\\\": 39.995,\\\\n    \\\\\\\"lng\\\\\\\": 116.470\\\\n  },\\\\n  \\\\\\\"crawl_time\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"2025-12-02 10:00:00\\\\\\\"\\\\n}\\\\n```\\\\n\\\\n### 房源数据 (House)\\\\n\\\\n```json\\\\n{\\\\n  \\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"67890\\\\\\\",\\\\n  \\\\\\\"community_id\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"12345\\\\\\\",\\\\n  \\\\\\\"title\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"望京花园 精装两居室 南北通透\\\\\\\",\\\\n  \\\\\\\"price\\\\\\\": 550,\\\\n  \\\\\\\"unit_price\\\\\\\": 68750,\\\\n  \\\\\\\"area\\\\\\\": 80,\\\\n  \\\\\\\"room\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"2室1厅\\\\\\\",\\\\n  \\\\\\\"floor\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"中楼层/共20层\\\\\\\",\\\\n  \\\\\\\"orientation\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"南北\\\\\\\",\\\\n  \\\\\\\"decoration\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"精装\\\\\\\",\\\\n  \\\\\\\"publish_time\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"2025-12-01\\\\\\\",\\\\n  \\\\\\\"tags\\\\\\\": [\\\\\\\"满五唯一\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"地铁房\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"学区房\\\\\\\"],\\\\n  \\\\\\\"description\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"...\\\\\\\",\\\\n  \\\\\\\"crawl_time\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"2025-12-02 10:00:00\\\\\\\"\\\\n}\\\\n```\\\\n\\\\n### 价格走势 (PriceTrend)\\\\n\\\\n```json\\\\n{\\\\n  \\\\\\\"community_id\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"12345\\\\\\\",\\\\n  \\\\\\\"date\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"2025-11\\\\\\\",\\\\n  \\\\\\\"avg_price\\\\\\\": 65000,\\\\n  \\\\\\\"deal_count\\\\\\\": 15,\\\\n  \\\\\\\"list_count\\\\\\\": 80,\\\\n  \\\\\\\"crawl_time\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"2025-12-02 10:00:00\\\\\\\"\\\\n}\\\\n```\\\\n\\\\n## 🛡️ 反爬对抗策略\\\\n\\\\n### 1. IP封禁应对\\\\n- 使用代理池，自动轮换IP\\\\n- 支持多种代理源（文件、API）\\\\n- 自动检测和剔除失效代理\\\\n\\\\n### 2. 请求头伪装\\\\n- 随机User-Agent\\\\n- 完整的浏览器请求头\\\\n- Cookie自动管理\\\\n\\\\n### 3. 登录态管理\\\\n- 账号池轮换\\\\n- Session持久化\\\\n- 自动登录和重登\\\\n\\\\n### 4. 验证码处理\\\\n- OCR自动识别（ddddocr）\\\\n- 人工打码平台（可选）\\\\n- 验证码触发降频\\\\n\\\\n### 5. 接口加密破解\\\\n- JavaScript逆向分析\\\\n- 参数加密算法复现\\\\n- 签名生成\\\\n\\\\n## 📈 监控与日志\\\\n\\\\n### 查看爬取统计\\\\n```bash\\\\n# 实时监控\\\\ntail -f logs/scrapy.log\\\\n\\\\n# 统计信息\\\\npython utils/stats.py\\\\n```\\\\n\\\\n### 日志级别\\\\n- `DEBUG`: 详细调试信息\\\\n- `INFO`: 一般信息\\\\n- `WARNING`: 警告信息\\\\n- `ERROR`: 错误信息\\\\n\\\\n## 🔧 高级功能\\\\n\\\\n### 分布式爬取\\\\n```python\\\\n# 使用Scrapy-Redis实现分布式\\\\n# 详见文档: docs/distributed.md\\\\n```\\\\n\\\\n### 数据分析\\\\n```python\\\\n# Jupyter Notebook分析示例\\\\n# 详见: notebooks/analysis.ipynb\\\\n```\\\\n\\\\n### 定时任务\\\\n```bash\\\\n# 使用crontab设置定时爬取\\\\n0 2 * * * cd /path/to/lianjia-spider && scrapy crawl house\\\\n```\\\\n\\\\n## ⚠️ 注意事项\\\\n\\\\n1. **法律合规**\\\\n   - 仅用于个人学习研究\\\\n   - 不得用于商业目的\\\\n   - 尊重网站服务条款\\\\n\\\\n2. **爬取频率**\\\\n   - 建议设置3秒以上延迟\\\\n   - 避免高并发请求\\\\n   - 夜间爬取降低影响\\\\n\\\\n3. **数据使用**\\\\n   - 不得售卖数据\\\\n   - 注意数据隐私\\\\n   - 合理使用数据\\\\n\\\\n4. **风险提示**\\\\n   - IP可能被封禁\\\\n   - 账号可能被限制\\\\n   - 反爬策略可能更新\\\\n\\\\n## 📚 文档\\\\n\\\\n详细文档请参考：\\\\n- [完整实施计划](PLAN.md)\\\\n- [接口分析文档](docs/API.md)\\\\n- [常见问题FAQ](docs/FAQ.md)\\\\n\\\\n## 🤝 贡献\\\\n\\\\n欢迎提交Issue和Pull Request！\\\\n\\\\n## 📄 许可证\\\\n\\\\n本项目仅供学习研究使用。使用本项目代码造成的任何后果由使用者自行承担。\\\\n\\\\n## 📮 logging.getLogger(__name__)\\\\r\\\\n\\\\r\\\\n\\\\r\\\\nclass DataCleanPipeline:\\\\r\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"数据清洗Pipeline\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\r\\\\n    \\\\r\\\\n    def process_item(self, item, spider):\\\\r\\\\n        \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"清洗数据\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\r\\\\n        \\\\r\\\\n        # 清理字符串字段（去除多余空格、换行等）\\\\r\\\\n        for key, value in item.items():\\\\r\\\\n            if isinstance(value, str):\\\\r\\\\n                # 去除首尾空格\\\\r\\\\n                value = value.strip()\\\\r\\\\n                # 去除多余空格\\\\r\\\\n                value = re.sub(r'\\\\\\\\s+', ' ', value)\\\\r\\\\n                # 去除特殊字符\\\\r\\\\n                # value = re.sub(r'[^\\\\\\\\w\\\\\\\\s\\\\\\\\-,.，。、]', '', value)\\\\r\\\\n                \\\\r\\\\n                item[key] = value\\\\r\\\\n        \\\\r\\\\n        # 清理价格字段（确保是数字）\\\\r\\\\n        price_fields = ['price', 'unit_price', 'avg_price', 'deal_price', 'deal_unit_price']\\\\r\\\\n        for field in price_fields:\\\\r\\\\n            if field in item and item[field]:\\\\r\\\\n                try:\\\\r\\\\n                    # 移除逗号等\\\\r\\\\n                    if isinstance(item[field], str):\\\\r\\\\n                        item[field] = float(item[field].replace(',', ''))\\\\r\\\\n                except ValueError:\\\\r\\\\n                    logger.warning(f\\\\\\\"无法转换价格字段: {field}={item[field]}\\\\\\\")\\\\r\\\\n                    item[field] = None\\\\r\\\\n        \\\\r\\\\n        # 清理面积字段\\\\r\\\\n        if 'area' in item and item['area']:\\\\r\\\\n            try:\\\\r\\\\n                if isinstance(item['area'], str):\\\\r\\\\n                    # 提取数字\\\\r\\\\n                    area = re.search(r'([\\\\\\\\d.]+)', item['area'])\\\\r\\\\n                    if area:\\\\r\\\\n                        item['area'] = float(area.group(1))\\\\r\\\\n                    else:\\\\r\\\\n                        item['area'] = None\\\\r\\\\n            except:\\\\r\\\\n                item['area'] = None\\\\r\\\\n        \\\\r\\\\n        # 清理建筑年代\\\\r\\\\n        if 'build_year' in item and item['build_year']:\\\\r\\\\n            try:\\\\r\\\\n                if isinstance(item['build_year'], str):\\\\r\\\\n                    # 提取4位数字\\\\r\\\\n                    year = \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\r\\\\n        初始化加密器\\\\r\\\\n        \\\\r\\\\n        Args:\\\\r\\\\n            key: AES密钥（需要通过逆向获取）\\\\r\\\\n            iv: AES初始向量（需要通过逆向获取）\\\\r\\\\n        \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\r\\\\n        # 这里的key和iv需要通过JavaScript逆向分析获取\\\\r\\\\n        # 以下为示例值，实际使用时需要替换\\\\r\\\\n        self.key = (key or \\\\\\\"lianjia_secret_key_16byte\\\\\\\").encode('utf-8')[:16]\\\\r\\\\n        self.iv = (iv or \\\\\\\"lianjia_iv_16byte\\\\\\\").encode('utf-8')[:16]\\\\r\\\\n    \\\\r\\\\n    def aes_encrypt(self, data: str) -> str:\\\\r\\\\n        \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\r\\\\n        AES加密\\\\r\\\\n        \\\\r\\\\n        Args:\\\\r\\\\n            data: 待加密的数据\\\\r\\\\n            \\\\r\\\\n        Returns:\\\\r\\\\n            加密后的Base64字符串\\\\r\\\\n        \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\r\\\\n        try:\\\\r\\\\n            cipher = AES.new(self.key, AES.MODE_CBC, base64.b64encode(encrypted).decode('utf-8')\\\\r\\\\n        except Exception as e:\\\\r\\\\n            print(f\\\\\\\"AES加密失败: {e}\\\\\\\")\\\\r\\\\n            return \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\r\\\\n    \\\\r\\\\n    def aes_decrypt(self, encrypted_data: str) -> str:\\\\r\\\\n        \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\r\\\\n        AES解密\\\\r\\\\n        \\\\r\\\\n        Args:\\\\r\\\\n            encrypted_data: Base64编码的加密数据\\\\r\\\\n            \\\\r\\\\n        Returns:\\\\r\\\\n            解密后的字符串\\\\r\\\\n        \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\r\\\\n        try:\\\\r\\\\n            encrypted = base64.b64decode(encrypted_data)\\\\r\\\\n            cipher = AES.new(self.key, AES.MODE_CBC, self.iv)\\\\r\\\\n            decrypted = cipher.decrypt(encrypted)\\\\r\\\\n            return unpad(decrypted, AES.block_size).decode('utf-8')\\\\r\\\\n        except Exception as e:\\\\r\\\\n            print(f\\\\\\\"AES解密失败: {e}\\\\\\\")\\\\r\\\\n            return \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\r\\\\n\\\\r\\\\n\\\\r\\\\ndef generate_sign(params: Dict[str, Any], secret: str = \\\\\\\"lianjia_secret\\\\\\\") -> str:\\\\r\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\r\\\\n    生成接口签名\\\\r\\\\n    \\\\r\\\\n    链家接口通常需要签名验证，签名算法需要通过逆向分析获取\\\\r\\\\n    这里提供一个通用的签名生成模板\\\\r\\\\n    \\\\r\\\\n    Args:\\\\r\\\\n        params: 请求参数字典\\\\r\\\\n        secret: 签名密钥\\\\r\\\\n        \\\\r\\\\n    Returns:\\\\r\\\\n        签名字符串\\\\r\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\r\\\\n    # 1. 按key排序\\\\r\\\\n    sorted_params = sorted(params.items(), key=lambda x: x[0])\\\\r\\\\n    \\\\r\\\\n    # 2. 拼接参数\\\\r\\\\n    param_str = '&'.join([f\\\\\\\"{k}={v}\\\\\\\" for k, v in sorted_params])\\\\r\\\\n    \\\\r\\\\n    # 3. 添加密钥\\\\r\\\\n    sign_str = f\\\\\\\"{param_str}&secret={secret}\\\\\\\"\\\\r\\\\n    \\\\r\\\\n    # 4. MD5加密\\\\r\\\\n    md5 = hashlib.md5()\\\\r\\\\n    md5.update(sign_str.encode('utf-8'))\\\\r\\\\n    signature = md5.hexdigest().upper()\\\\r\\\\n    \\\\r\\\\n    return signature\\\\r\\\\n\\\\r\\\\n\\\\r\\\\ndef generate_timestamp() -> int:\\\\r\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"生成时间戳（毫秒）\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\r\\\\n    return int(time.time() * 1000)\\\\r\\\\n\\\\r\\\\n\\\\r\\\\ndef generate_nonce(length: int = 32) -> str:\\\\r\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\r\\\\n    生成随机字符串\\\\r\\\\n    \\\\r\\\\n    Args:\\\\r\\\\n        length: 字符串长度\\\\r\\\\n        \\\\r\\\\n    Returns:\\\\r\\\\n        随机字符串\\\\r\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\r\\\\n    import random\\\\r\\\\n    import string\\\\r\\\\n    chars = string.ascii_letters + string.digits\\\\r\\\\n    return ''.join(random.choice(chars) for _ in range(length))\\\\r\\\\n\\\\r\\\\n\\\\r\\\\ndef encrypt_params(params: Dict[str, Any], crypto_helper: CryptoHelper = None) -> Dict[str, Any]:\\\\r\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\r\\\\n    加密请求参数\\\\r\\\\n    \\\\r\\\\n    实际使用时需要根据链家的加密逻辑进行调整\\\\r\\\\n    \\\\r\\\\n    Args:\\\\r\\\\n        params: 原始参数\\\\r\\\\n        crypto_helper: 加密辅助对象\\\\r\\\\n        \\\\r\\\\n    Returns:\\\\r\\\\n        加密后的参数\\\\r\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\r\\\\n    if crypto_helper is None:\\\\r\\\\n        crypto_helper = CryptoHelper()\\\\r\\\\n    \\\\r\\\\n    # 添加时间戳和随机数\\\\r\\\\n    params['timestamp'] = generate_timestamp()\\\\r\\\\n    params['nonce'] = generate_nonce()\\\\r\\\\n    \\\\r\\\\n    # 生成签名\\\\r\\\\n    params['sign'] = generate_sign(params)\\\\r\\\\n    \\\\r\\\\n    # 如果需要对整个参数进行加密\\\\r\\\\n    # encrypted_data = crypto_helper.aes_encrypt(json.dumps(params))\\\\r\\\\n    # return {'data': encrypted_data}\\\\r\\\\n    \\\\r\\\\n    return params\\\\r\\\\n\\\\r\\\\n\\\\r\\\\ndef decrypt_data(encrypted_data: str, crypto_helper: CryptoHelper = None) -> Dict[str, Any]:\\\\r\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\r\\\\n    解密响应数据\\\\r\\\\n    \\\\r\\\\n    Args:\\\\r\\\\n        encrypted_data: 加密的响应数据\\\\r\\\\n        crypto_helper: 加密辅助对象\\\\r\\\\n        \\\\r\\\\n    Returns:\\\\r\\\\n        解密后的数据\\\\r\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\r\\\\n    if crypto_helper is None:\\\\r\\\\n        crypto_helper = CryptoHelper()\\\\r\\\\n    \\\\r\\\\n    decrypted = crypto_helper.aes_decrypt(encrypted_data)\\\\r\\\\n    \\\\r\\\\n    try:\\\\r\\\\n        return json.loads(decrypted)\\\\r\\\\n    except:\\\\r\\\\n        return {}\\\\r\\\\n\\\\r\\\\n\\\\r\\\\ndef md5_hash(text: str) -> str:\\\\r\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"MD5哈希\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\r\\\\n    return hashlib.md5(text.encode('utf-8')).hexdigest()\\\\r\\\\n\\\\r\\\\n\\\\r\\\\ndef sha256_hash(text: str) -> str:\\\\r\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"SHA256哈希\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\r\\\\n    return hashlib.sha256(text.encode('utf-8')).hexdigest()\\\\r\\\\n\\\\r\\\\n\\\\r\\\\n# 使用示例\\\\r\\\\nif __name__ == \\\\\\\"__main__\\\\\\\":\\\\r\\\\n    # 测试加密解密\\\\r\\\\n    helper = CryptoHelper()\\\\r\\\\n    \\\\r\\\\n    original = \\\\\\\"Hello, Lianjia!\\\\\\\"\\\\r\\\\n    encrypted = helper.aes_encrypt(original)\\\\r\\\\n    decrypted = helper.aes_decrypt(encrypted)\\\\r\\\\n    \\\\r\\\\n    print(f\\\\\\\"原始数据: {original}\\\\\\\")\\\\r\\\\n    print(f\\\\\\\"加密数据: {encrypted}\\\\\\\")\\\\r\\\\n    print(f\\\\\\\"解密数据: {decrypted}\\\\\\\")\\\\r\\\\n    \\\\r\\\\n    # 房产小区、房源信息、价格走势\\n- **支持城市**: 北京、上海、广州、深圳等\\n\\n### 🏗️ 技术架构\\n\\n#### 核心框架\\n- **Scrapy**: 专业爬虫框架，提供完整的爬取生命周期管理\\n- **Playwright**: 处理动态JavaScript渲染的页面\\n- **数据存储**: 支持MongoDB、Redis、MySQL、文件等多种存储方式\\n\\n#### 项目结构分析\\n```\\nlianjia_spider/\\n├── spiders/          # 爬虫实现 (小区爬虫、房源爬虫、价格爬虫)\\n├── middlewares/      # 中间件 (代理、User-Agent、Cookie、重试等)\\n├── pipelines/        # 数据管道 (清洗、去重、存储、导出)\\n├── items/           # 数据模型定义\\n├── utils/           # 工具函数 (加密、验证码、登录、代理池)\\n└── settings.py      # 配置管理\\n```\\n\\n### 🛡️ 反爬对抗机制\\n\\n项目实现了**完整的反爬对抗体系**：\\n\\n1. **IP伪装**\\n   - 代理池管理 (文件/API两种方式)\\n   - 自动代理轮换和失效检测\\n\\n2. **请求头伪装**\\n   - User-Agent自动轮换\\n   - 完整的浏览器请求头模拟\\n\\n3. **会话管理**\\n   - Cookie自动管理\\n   - 账号池轮换登录\\n   - Session持久化\\n\\n4. **频率控制**\\n   - 可配置的请求延迟\\n   - 随机延迟避免检测\\n   - 并发数限制\\n\\n5. **验证码处理**\\n   - OCR自动识别 (ddddocr)\\n   - 打码平台支持 (2captcha等)\\n   - 验证码触发降频\\n\\n6. **接口加密破解**\\n   - AES加密解密工具\\n   - 签名算法逆向\\n   - 参数加密处理\\n\\n### 📈 数据处理能力\\n\\n#### 数据模型\\n- **CommunityItem**: 小区基本信息 (位置、房价、户数等)\\n- **HouseItem**: 房源详细数据 (户型、面积、价格、标签等)  \\n- **PriceItem**: 价格走势数据\\n\\n#### 数据管道\\n1. **DataCleanPipeline**: 数据清洗和标准化\\n2. **DuplicatesPipeline**: 数据去重 (基于Redis)\\n3. **MongoPipeline**: MongoDB存储\\n4. **ExportPipeline**: 文件导出 (JSON/CSV/Excel)\\n\\n#### 数据质量\\n- 自动数据类型转换\\n- 缺失值处理\\n- 字符串规范化\\n- 数值字段验证\\n\\n### 🔧 高级功能\\n\\n#### 增量更新\\n- 支持断点续爬\\n- 基于时间戳的增量同步\\n- Redis去重机制\\n\\n#### 监控与日志\\n- 详细的爬取统计\\n- 多级别日志记录\\n- 性能监控指标\\n\\n#### 扩展性\\n- 插件化的中间件架构\\n- 可配置的数据管道\\n- 支持分布式部署\\n\\n### 📋 项目成熟度评估\\n\\n#### 优点\\n✅ [修复完成说明.md](修复完成说明.md)\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 📋 项目概述\\n\\n本项目旨在爬取链家网站的房产数据，主要包括：\\n- 特定小区的房源列表\\n- 房源详细特征（户型、面积、价格等）\\n- 历史价格走势\\n- 成交记录\\n\\n## 🎯 核心功能\\n\\n- ✅ 完整的反爬对抗机制（代理池、User-Agent轮换、Cookie管理）\\n- ✅ 支持登录态管理和验证码识别\\n- ✅ 接口加密破解（逆向分析）\\n- ✅ 动态页面渲染（Playwright支持）\\n- ✅ 数据持久化（MongoDB/MySQL）\\n- ✅ 完善的日志和监控系统\\n- ✅ 增量更新和断点续爬\\n\\n## 📂 项目结构\\n\\n```\\nlianjia-spider/\\n├── config/                  # 配置文件目录\\n│   ├── settings.example.py  # 配置模板\\n│   ├── accounts.example.json # 账号池模板\\n│   └── proxies.example.txt  # 代理池模板\\n├── lianjia_spider/          # Scrapy项目主目录\\n│   ├── spiders/             # 爬虫脚本\\n│   │   ├── community_spider.py    # 小区爬虫\\n│   │   ├── house_spider.py        # 房源爬虫\\n│   │   └── price_spider.py        # 价格走势爬虫\\n│   ├── middlewares/         # 中间件\\n│   │   ├── proxy_middleware.py    # 代理中间件\\n│   │   ├── useragent_middleware.py # UA中间件\\n│   │   ├── cookie_middleware.py   # Cookie中间件\\n│   │   └── retry_middleware.py    # 重试中间件\\n│   ├── pipelines/           # 数据管道\\n│   │   ├── clean_pipeline.py      # 数据清洗\\n│   │   ├── duplicate_pipeline.py  # 去重\\n│   │   ├── mongo_pipeline.py      # MongoDB存储\\n│   │   └── export_pipeline.py     # 文件导出\\n│   ├── items/               # 数据模型\\n│   │   ├── community_item.py      # 小区数据模型\\n│   │   ├── house_item.py          # 房源数据模型\\n│   │   └── price_item.py          # 价格数据模型\\n│   ├── utils/               # 工具函数\\n│   │   ├── crypto.py              # 加密解密\\n│   │   ├── captcha.py             # 验证码识别\\n│   │   ├── login.py               # 登录管理\\n│   │   └── proxy_pool.py          # 代理池管理\\n│   └── settings.py          # Scrapy配置\\n├── data/                    # 数据存储目录\\n│   ├── raw/                 # 原始数据\\n│   ├── processed/           # 处理后数据\\n│   └── exports/             # 导出数据\\n├── logs/                    # 日志目录\\n├── sessions/                # Session存储\\n├── tests/                   # 测试文件\\n├── notebooks/               # Jupyter分析笔记本\\n├── docs/                    # 文档\\n│   └── API.md               # 接口文档\\n├── requirements.txt         # 依赖包\\n├── scrapy.cfg              # Scrapy配置\\n├── PLAN.md                 # 详细实施计划\\n└── README.md               # 项目说明\\n```\\n\\n## 🚀 快速开始\\n\\n### 1. 环境要求\\n\\n- Python 3.10+\\n- MongoDB 4.0+ (可选)\\n- Redis 5.0+ (可选)\\n\\n### 2. 安装依赖\\n\\n**推荐使用 Python 3.10 或 3.11** （Python 3.13 可能有兼容性问题）\\n\\n**方式 A: 快速启动脚本（推荐）**\\n```bash\\n# Windows\\nquick_start.bat\\n\\n# Linux/Mac\\nbash quick_start.sh\\n```\\n\\n**方式 B: 手动安装**\\n```bash\\n# 克隆项目\\ngit clone https://github.com/your-username/lianjia-spider.git\\ncd lianjia-spider\\n\\n# 创建虚拟环境\\npython -m venv venv\\nsource venv/bin/activate  # Windows: venv\\\\Scripts\\\\activate\\n\\n# 升级 pip\\npython -m pip install --upgrade pip\\n\\n# 安装依赖\\npip install -r requirements.txt\\n\\n# 如果安装失败，使用国内镜像\\npip install -r requirements.txt -i https://pypi.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/simple\\n\\n# 安装Playwright浏览器\\nplaywright install chromium\\n```\\n\\n**遇到安装问题？**\\n- 查看详细安装指南: [INSTALL.md](INSTALL.md)\\n- 运行环境检查: `python check_env.py`\\n- 使用最小化安装: `pip install -r requirements-minimal.txt`\\n\\n### 3. 配置项目\\n\\n```bash\\n# 复制配置文件\\ncp config/settings.example.py config/settings.py\\ncp config/accounts.example.json config/accounts.json\\ncp config/proxies.example.txt config/proxies.txt\\n\\n# 编辑配置文件，填入你的代理IP、账号等信息\\n# 主要配置项：\\n# - TARGET_CITY: 目标城市\\n# - MONGO_URI: MongoDB连接地址\\n# - PROXY_FILE: 代理IP文件路径\\n# - ACCOUNTS_FILE: 账号池文件路径\\n```\\n\\n### 4. 运行爬虫\\n\\n```bash\\n# 爬取小区列表\\nscrapy crawl community -a city=beijing\\n\\n# 爬取指定小区的房源\\nscrapy crawl house -a community=\\\"望京花园\\\"\\n\\n# 爬取价格走势\\nscrapy crawl price -a community_id=\\\"12345\\\"\\n```\\n\\n### 5. 数据导出\\n\\n```bash\\n# 导出为CSV\\npython utils/export_data.py --collection communities --format csv --output data/communities.csv\\n\\n# 导出为JSON\\npython utils/export_data.py --collection houses --format json --output data/houses.json\\n\\n# 导出为Excel\\npython utils/export_data.py --collection houses --format excel --output data/houses.xlsx\\n```\\n\\n## 📊 数据结构\\n\\n### 小区数据 (Community)\\n\\n```json\\n{\\n  \\\"id\\\": \\\"12345\\\",\\n  \\\"name\\\": \\\"望京花园\\\",\\n 10:00:00\\\"\\n}\\n```\\n\\n## 🛡️ 反爬对抗策略\\n\\n### 1. IP封禁应对\\n- 使用代理池，自动轮换IP\\n- 支持多种代理源（文件、API）\\n- 自动检测和剔除失效代理\\n\\n### 2. 请求头伪装\\n- 随机User-Agent\\n- 完整的浏览器请求头\\n- Cookie自动管理\\n\\n### 3. 登录态管理\\n- 账号池轮换\\n- Session持久化\\n- 自动登录和重登\\n\\n### 4. 验证码处理\\n- OCR自动识别（ddddocr）\\n- 人工打码平台（可选）\\n- 验证码触发降频\\n\\n### 5. 接口加密破解\\n- JavaScript逆向分析\\n- 参数加密算法复现\\n- 签名生成\\n\\n## 📈 监控与日志\\n\\n### 查看爬取统计\\n```bash\\n# 实时监控\\ntail -f logs/scrapy.log\\n\\n# 统计信息\\npython utils/stats.py\\n```\\n\\n### 日志级别\\n- `DEBUG`: 详细调试信息\\n- `INFO`: 一般信息\\n- `WARNING`: 警告信息\\n- `ERROR`: 错误信息\\n\\n## 🔧 高级功能\\n\\n### 分布式爬取\\n```python\\n# 使用Scrapy-Redis实现分布式\\n# 详见文档: 运行调试脚本\\npython debug_crawler.py\\n\\n# 3. 输入小区名称\\n# 例如：世纪公园、陆家嘴、金桥等\\n```\\n\\n📖 **详细说明：** [如何使用调试脚本.md](如何使用调试脚本.md)\\n\\n---\\n\\n## ✅ 所有问题已修复\\n\\n我已经修复了以下所有问题：\\n1. ✅ DealRecordItem 导入错误\\n2. ✅ 中间件路径错误  \\n3. ✅ Pipeline 路径错误\\n4. ✅ ddddocr/Pillow 可选依赖问题\\n\\n## 📋 完整框架测试（3步走）\\n\\n### 第 1 步：测试导入\\n\\n```bash\\npython test_import.py\\n```\\n\\n如果全部显示 ✓，说明环境正常。\\n\\n### 第 2 步：运行爬虫\\n\\n```bash\\n# 最简单的测试（导出到文件，不需要数据库）\\nscrapy crawl house -a city=beijing -o test.json -s LOG_LEVEL=INFO\\n```\\n\\n### 第 3 步：查看结果\\n\\n```bash\\n# 查看爬取的数据\\ntype test.json\\n```\\n\\n## 🎯 如果第2步失败\\n\\n### 可能原因 1: 找不到网页\\n\\n**原因：** 链家网站结构可能已变化\\n\\n**解决：** 这是正常的，需要实际抓包分析更新选择器\\n\\n```bash\\n# 先测试网络连接\\ncurl https://bj.lianjia.com/xiaoqu/\\n```\\n\\n### 可能原因 2: 代理配置错误\\n\\n**解决：** 确保 `config/settings.py` 中设置：\\n\\n```python\\nUSE_PROXY = False  # 首次测试禁用代理\\n```\\n\\n### 可能原因 3: MongoDB 连接失败\\n\\n**解决：** 使用文件导出，不使用数据库：\\n\\n```bash\\n# 直接导出到 JSON，不经过 Pipeline\\nscrapy crawl house -a city=beijing -o test.json\\n```\\n\\n## 🔧 推荐的首次配置\\n\\n编辑 `config/settings.py`：\\n\\n```python\\n# 1. 禁用不需要的功能（首次测试）\\nUSE_PROXY = False          # 禁用代理\\nREQUIRE_LOGIN = False      # 禁用登录\\n\\n# 2. 降低请求频率（避免被封）\\nDOWNLOAD_DELAY = 5         # 5秒延迟\\nCONCURRENT_REQUESTS = 2    # 只用2个并发\\n\\n# 3. 简化 Pipeline（只保留清洗和去重）\\nITEM_PIPELINES = {\\n    'lianjia_spider.pipelines.clean_pipeline.DataCleanPipeline': 100,\\n    'lianjia_spider.pipelines.duplicate_pipeline.DuplicatesPipeline': 200,\\n    # 'lianjia_spider.pipelines.mongo_pipeline.MongoPipeline': 300,  # 注释掉\\n}\\n\\n# 4. 设置日志级别\\nLOG_LEVEL = 'INFO'\\n```\\n\\n## 📝 完整的工作流程\\n\\n### 方式 1: 使用启动脚本（推荐）\\n\\n```bash\\n# 爬取小区数据\\npython run_spider.py community --city beijing --output data/communities.json\\n\\n# 爬取房源数据\\npython run_spider.py house --city shanghai --district pudong --output data/houses.json\\n```\\n\\n### 方式 2: 使用 Scrapy 命令\\n\\n```bash\\n# 爬取并导出\\nscrapy crawl house -a city=beijing -o data/houses.json\\n\\n# 只爬不存储（测试用）\\nscrapy crawl house -a city=beijing -s LOG_LEVEL=DEBUG\\n```\\n\\n### 方式 3: Python 脚本\\n\\n```python\\n# 创建 run_my_spider.py\\nfrom scrapy.crawler import CrawlerProcess\\nfrom scrapy.utils.project import get_project_settings\\n\\nprocess = for 'lianjia_spider/spiders/house_spider.py'] Result:\\n# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-\\r\\n\\\"\\\"\\\"\\r\\n房源爬虫\\r\\n\\\"\\\"\\\"\\r\\n\\r\\nimport scrapy\\r\\nfrom urllib.parse import urljoin\\r\\nimport json\\r\\nimport re\\r\\nfrom .base_spider import BaseSpider\\r\\nfrom lianjia_spider.items import HouseItem\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\nclass HouseSpider(BaseSpider):\\r\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"房源爬虫\\\"\\\"\\\"\\r\\n    \\r\\n    name = 'house'\\r\\n    \\r\\n    custom_settings = {\\r\\n        'DOWNLOAD_DELAY': 3,\\r\\n        'CONCURRENT_REQUESTS': 8,\\r\\n    }\\r\\n    \\r\\n    def __init__(self, city='beijing', district=None, community=None, *args, **kwargs):\\r\\n        super().__init__(city, *args, **kwargs)\\r\\n        self.district = district  # 行政区\\r\\n        self.community = community  # 指定小区名称\\r\\n        \\r\\n    def start_requests(self):\\r\\n        \\\"\\\"\\\"生成起始请求\\\"\\\"\\\"\\r\\n        \\r\\n        # 方式1: 按区域爬取\\r\\n        if self.district:\\r\\n            url = f'{self.base_url}/ershoufang/{self.district}/'\\r\\n        elif self.community:\\r\\n            # 搜索小区房源\\r\\n            url = f'{self.base_url}/ershoufang/rs{self.community}/'\\r\\n        else:\\r\\n            # 所有房源\\r\\n            url = f'{self.base_url}/ershoufang/'\\r\\n        \\r\\n        yield self.make_request(\\r\\n            url=url,\\r\\n            callback=self.parse_house_list\\r\\n        )\\r\\n    \\r\\n    def parse_house_list(self, response):\\r\\n        \\\"\\\"\\\"解析房源列表页面\\\"\\\"\\\"\\r\\n        self.stats['success_requests'] += 1\\r\\n        \\r\\n        # 提取房源列表\\r\\n        house_items = response.css('.sellListContent li.clear')\\r\\n        \\r\\n        self.logger.info(f\\\"找到 {len(house_items)} 个房源\\\")\\r\\n        \\r\\n        for item in house_items:\\r\\n            # 提取房源链接\\r\\n            house_url = item.css('.info .title a::attr(href)').get()\\r\\n            house_title = item.css('.info .title a::text').get()\\r\\n            \\r\\n            if house_url:\\r\\n                house_url = urljoin(self.base_url, house_url)\\r\\n                \\r\\n                # 提取列表页的部分信息\\r\\n                price = item.css('.priceInfo .totalPrice span::text').get()\\r\\n                unit_price = item.css('.priceInfo .unitPrice span::text').get()\\r\\n                \\r\\n                # 请求详情页\\r\\n                yield self.make_request(\\r\\n                    url=house_url,\\r\\n                    callback=self.parse_house_detail,\\r\\n                    meta={\\r\\n                        'house_title': house_title,\\r\\n                        'list_price': price,\\r\\n                        'list_unit_price': unit_price\\r\\n                    }\\r\\n                )\\r\\n        \\r\\n        # 翻页\\r\\n        next_page = response.css('.page-box .page-data a[comp-module=\\\"page_next\\\"]::attr(href)').get()\\r\\n        if next_page:\\r\\n            next_url = urljoin(self.base_url, next_page)\\r\\n            self.logger.info(f\\\"下一页: {next_url}\\\")\\r\\n            yield self.make_request(\\r\\n                url=next_url,\\r\\n                callback=self.parse_house_list\\r\\n            )\\r\\n    \\r\\n    def parse_house_detail(self, response):\\r\\n        \\\"\\\"\\\"解析房源详情页面\\\"\\\"\\\"\\r\\n        self.logger.info(f\\\"解析房源详情: {response.url}\\\")\\r\\n        \\r\\n        # 提取房源ID\\r\\n        house_id = re.search(r'/ershoufang/(\\\\d+)\\\\.html', response.url)\\r\\n        house_id = house_id.group(1) if house_id else None\\r\\n        \\r\\n        # 创建房源Item\\r\\n        item = HouseItem()\\r\\n        \\r\\n        # 基本信息\\r\\n        item['id'] = house_id\\r\\n        item['title'] = response.css('.introContent .title h1::text').get(default='').strip()\\r\\n        item['url'] = response.url\\r\\n        item['city'] = self.city\\r\\n        item['crawl_time'] = self.get_crawl_time()\\r\\n        \\r\\n        # 价格信息\\r\\n        total_price = response.css('.introContent .price .total::text').get()\\r\\n        if total_price:\\r\\n            item['price'] = float(total_price)\\r\\n        \\r\\n        unit_price = response.css('.introContent .price .unitPriceValue::text').get()\\r\\n        if unit_price:\\r\\n            item['unit_price'] = float(unit_price.replace(',', ''))\\r\\n        \\r\\n        # 小区信息\\r\\n        community_name = response.css('.introContent .aroundInfo .communityName a.info::text').get()\\r\\n        item['community_name'] = community_name.strip() if community_name else None\\r\\n        \\r\\n        # 房屋基本信息\\r\\n        base_info = response.css('.introContent .base .content')\\r\\n        info_items = base_info.css('li')\\r\\n        \\r\\n        for info in info_items:\\r\\n            label = info.css('.label::text').get(default='').strip()\\r\\n            \\r\\n            if '房屋户型' in label:\\r\\n                room = info.css('::text').getall()[-1].strip()\\r\\n                item['room'] = room\\r\\n                # 解析户型，如\\\"3室2厅1卫\\\"\\r\\n                match = re.search(r'(\\\\d+)室(\\\\d+)厅(\\\\d+)卫', room)\\r\\n                if match:\\r\\n                    item['room_count'] = int(match.group(1))\\r\\n                    item['hall_count'] = int(match.group(2))\\r\\n
